# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

replicas:
  master:
    class: Redis
    host: "master_ip"
    port: "6379"
    password: ""
    replica_password: "" # If you want to add authentication later, uncomment and set this field
    maxmemory: "0"
    maxmemory-policy: volatile-lru
    min-slaves-to-write: 0
    slaveof:
      None: None

  slaves:
    - replicas:
        class: Redis
        host: "slave1_ip"
        port: "6379"
        maxmemory: "0"
        maxmemory-policy: volatile-lru
      master: master

    - replicas:
        class: Redis
        host: "slave2_ip"
        port: "6379"
        maxmemory: "0"
        maxmemory-policy: volatile-lru
      master: master
